title: Fix Dark_Mellow wallpaper install settings
description: Fix the Dark_Mellow GitHub installer so the wallpaper applies on another Mint/Cinnamon PC instead of showing only a solid color. Patch installer background gsettings, validate, review, and push to BigCatMellow/Dark_Mellow.
acceptance_criteria: Installer sets wallpaper URI for relevant Cinnamon/GNOME background keys
Installer sets picture-options so wallpaper is displayed instead of solid color
Fix is pushed to GitHub after review
